creator: bas@area536.com
text:
This laptop hasn't been able to run FreeBSD reliably since 9.0 and now
again using 9.1. It'ĺl work fine for a while, but eventually seems
to overheat when working under too much load for an extended period of
time. The machine powers off instantly, without bothering to go through
a shutdown sequence of any kind. I run powerd. Machine itself is OK,
works fine using Debian Linux.

Pasting /var/log/messages below this line:
